untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detecting 'price consolidation' and 'sharp rejection away from tested level' which are qualitative pattern descriptions not directly expressible as quantitative indicator conditions. The original text is incomplete/truncated, preventing full translation of the consolidation detection logic. ATR-based range compression is offered as a proxy for consolidation detection, but this may not capture the intended pattern semantics.
translation_notes: GRIMES_DRY_6_0 is a failure test rejection pattern. Entry approximated as price rejecting pivot levels (s1/r1) with directional confirmation. Exit on consolidation approximated as bar range or body < ATR_14 (indicating low momentum continuation). Max 3-bar hold enforced. Direction set CONTEXT_DEPENDENT since the rule applies to both long and short failure tests. Author's truncated text prevented precise consolidation threshold specification.
